args:
Benchmark task: helper-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md. This is a long, simple read and write task for a small local model. Do not refactor or fix anything. First create the bench-artifacts directory if needed. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/helper/factory/index.ts, src/helper/route/index.ts, src/helper/websocket/index.ts, src/helper/cookie/index.ts, src/helper/testing/index.ts, src/helper/adapter/index.ts, src/helper/css/index.ts, src/helper/css/common.ts, src/helper/proxy/index.ts, src/helper/dev/index.ts, src/helper/html/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts, src/helper/accepts/index.ts, src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts, src/helper/conninfo/index.ts, src/helper/conninfo/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Helper Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write four short bullets: '- Main exports or names: ...', '- Reads as: ...', '- Neighbor files: ...', and '- Safe summary: ...'. Use simple wording and cite paths literally. Add a final section '## Simple Index' that repeats all file paths as a checklist. Do not edit source files. In the final answer, include the created file path and verification status.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer.

commands.command: test -f bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '# Helper Read/Write Ledger' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/helper/factory/index.ts' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md

artifacts.content:
# Helper Read/Write Ledger

## src/helper/factory/index.ts

- Main exports or names: Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware
- Reads as: src/hono, src/hono-base, src/types
- Neighbor files: src/helper/route, src/helper/cookie
- Safe summary: Factory class creates Hono apps with initApp callback and handler arrays up to 10 handlers

## src/helper/route/index.ts

- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
- Reads as: src/context, src/request/constants, src/types, src/utils/url
- Neighbor files: src/helper/factory, src/helper/conninfo
- Safe summary: Inspects router matches and returns path, basePath for each matched route with caching

## src/helper/websocket/index.ts

- Main exports or names: defineWebSocketHelper, WSContext, WSEvents, UpgradeWebSocket
- Reads as: src/context, src/types
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming, src/http-exception
- Safe summary: Defines WebSocket upgrade handlers with onOpen/onMessage/onClose/onEvent listeners

## src/helper/cookie/index.ts

- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, setCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie, generateCookie, generateSignedCookie
- Reads as: src/utils/cookie
- Neighbor files: src/helper/factory, src/helper/route
- Safe summary: Reads and writes cookies with support for signed cookies and Secure/Host prefixes

## src/helper/testing/index.ts

- Main exports or names: testClient
- Reads as: src/client, src/context, src/hono, src/types
- Neighbor files: src/helper/route, src/helper/cookie
- Safe summary: Creates test client for Hono app using client-side HTTP generation

## src/helper/adapter/index.ts

- Main exports or names: env, getRuntimeKey, checkUserAgentEquals, knownUserAgents
- Reads as: src/context
- Neighbor files: src/helper/cookie, src/helper/factory
- Safe summary: Detects runtime environment (node/deno/bun/workerd/fastly/edge-light) and exports env bindings

## src/helper/css/index.ts

- Main exports or names: css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, createCssContext
- Reads as: src/helper/html, src/jsx/constants, src/jsx/dom/css, src/utils/html, src/helper/css/common
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming, src/helper/html
- Safe summary: Generates and manages CSS class names with runtime styles for server and client rendering

## src/helper/css/common.ts

- Main exports or names: cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, rawCssString, minify, toHash
- Reads as: No internal imports
- Neighbor files: src/helper/css, src/helper/streaming
- Safe summary: Core CSS helpers for building class selectors, hashing styles, and minifying CSS strings

## src/helper/proxy/index.ts

- Main exports or names: proxy
- Reads as: src/http-exception, src/utils/headers
- Neighbor files: src/helper/adapter, src/helper/streaming
- Safe summary: Proxy fetch API wrapper that strips hop-by-hop headers and handles strict RFC 9110 Connection header parsing

## src/helper/dev/index.ts

- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName
- Reads as: src/hono, src/types, src/utils/color, src/utils/handler
- Neighbor files: src/helper/factory, src/helper/adapter
- Safe summary: Displays registered routes with method/path and handler names, supports color output

## src/helper/html/index.ts

- Main exports or names: html, raw
- Reads as: src/utils/html
- Neighbor files: src/helper/cookie, src/helper/css, src/helper/ssg
- Safe summary: Escapes and interpolates template strings into HtmlEscapedString with callback support

## src/helper/ssg/index.ts

- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, ssgParams, disableSSG, onlySSG, defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin
- Reads as: src/client/utils, src/hono, src/types, src/utils/concurrent, src/utils/mime, src/helper/ssg/ssg, src/helper/ssg/middleware, src/helper/ssg/plugins, src/helper/ssg/utils
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming, src/helper/ssg/utils, src/helper/ssg/middleware
- Safe summary: Static site generation tool that fetches routes, generates HTML files with concurrency and hooks

## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts

- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, ToSSGInterface, ToSSGAdaptorInterface, ToSSGOptions, SSGPlugin
- Reads as: src/client/utils, src/hono, src/types, src/helper/ssg/middleware, src/helper/ssg/utils
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg, src/helper/streaming, src/helper/ssg/utils
- Safe summary: Core SSG implementation with plugin system, hooks, extension mapping, and content parsing

## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts

- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
- Reads as: src/hono, src/types, src/utils/handler
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg, src/helper/streaming, src/helper/ssg/middleware
- Safe summary: Path utilities for SSG including path traversal protection and dynamic route detection

## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts

- Main exports or names: ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, SSG_CONTEXT, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY
- Reads as: src/hono, src/types, src/helper/ssg/utils
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg, src/helper/streaming, src/helper/ssg/ssg
- Safe summary: Middleware for SSG context detection and dynamic route parameters

## src/helper/streaming/index.ts

- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText
- Reads as: src/utils/stream, src/helper/streaming/stream, src/helper/streaming/sse, src/helper/streaming/text
- Neighbor files: src/helper/css, src/helper/html, src/helper/ssg
- Safe summary: Exports streaming helpers for chunked responses, SSE, and text streams

## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts

- Main exports or names: stream
- Reads as: src/context, src/utils/stream, src/helper/streaming/utils
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming, src/http-exception
- Safe summary: Creates streaming Response with TransformStream, handles error callbacks and Bun v1.1.27 compatibility

## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts

- Main exports or names: streamSSE, SSEStreamingApi, SSEMessage
- Reads as: src/context, src/utils/html, src/utils/stream, src/helper/streaming/utils
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming, src/http-exception
- Safe summary: Server-Sent Events streaming with event/id/retry headers and error message broadcasting

## src/helper/streaming/text.ts

- Main exports or names: streamText
- Reads as: src/context, src/helper/streaming, src/context
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming, src/helper/html
- Safe summary: Text streaming helper setting Content-Type, X-Content-Type-Options, Transfer-Encoding headers

## src/helper/accepts/index.ts

- Main exports or names: accepts
- Reads as: src/helper/accepts/accepts
- Neighbor files: src/helper/cookie, src/helper/factory
- Safe summary: Exports accepts helper for matching Accept header preferences

## src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts

- Main exports or names: accepts, Accept, acceptsConfig, acceptsOptions, defaultMatch
- Reads as: src/context, src/utils/accept, src/utils/headers
- Neighbor files: src/helper/cookie, src/helper/factory
- Safe summary: Parses Accept headers and matches best supported type with quality value sorting

## src/helper/conninfo/index.ts

- Main exports or names: GetConnInfo, NetAddrInfo, ConnInfo, AddressType
- Reads as: src/helper/conninfo/types
- Neighbor files: src/helper/cookie, src/helper/factory
- Safe summary: Exports connection info type definitions for remote address/port retrieval

## src/helper/conninfo/types.ts

- Main exports or names: GetConnInfo, ConnInfo, NetAddrInfo, AddressType
- Reads as: src/context
- Neighbor files: src/helper/cookie, src/helper/factory
- Safe summary: Defines ConnInfo interface with remote address, port, transport, and IPv4/IPv6 type

## Simple Index

- [src/helper/route/index.ts](src/helper/route/index.ts)

- [src/helper/proxy/index.ts](src/helper/proxy/index.ts)
- [src/helper/dev/index.ts](src/helper/dev/index.ts)
- [src/helper/html/index.ts](src/helper/html/index.ts)
- [src/helper/ssg/index.ts](src/helper/ssg/index.ts)
- [src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts](src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts)
- [src/helper/ssg/utils.ts](src/helper/ssg/utils.ts)
- [src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts](src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts)
- [src/helper/streaming/index.ts](src/helper/streaming/index.ts)
- [src/helper/streaming/stream.ts](src/helper/streaming/stream.ts)

- [src/helper/accepts/index.ts](src/helper/accepts/index.ts)
